reviews.title: Overall the services is not up to expected as per their rating.
reviews.text: I have been travelling and stay with Marriott hotel. So far all are ok except this. The services are not up to what I expected. They are not considerate. I receiving a call middle of the night and asking to check in my Husband which they claim that he just check in that day. All information has been provided the first day I check in and I even got my 2 rooms key card. I Guess if they need us to check in one more time, it will be great if they drop a message or notes in my room the next day when they cleaning the room and we will pleased to do so for sure. The reception calling right away when we step into the room and claim that my Husband check in today which he claim that he see that from cctv. Which I kind of piss off when I listen to this and inform the staff that if he could check the cctv my Husband check in a day before this. I don’t feel privacy at all at that point of time and feel like being monitor via cctv. I will not go back to this hotel anymore

reviews.text:
we arrived at hcmc early in the morning and was able to check in. since we are marriott member, we decided to upgrade to club floor. but when we get to the room, there was a real musky smell. it took a long time to switch to a different room. that one also smelled but a little better. we were too tired to change to another one. no real apology or try to improve situation by hotel. then after doing some research, realized that the upgrade fee the hotel charged us was  night more than agoda and even hotel's own web site!!  

the club  was ok but small as always ran out to tables due too many guest. service was adequate but not great which is not really acceptable for club!

the hotel experience was not bad but not great either. a bit disappointing for a marriott hotel!

reviews.title: Very average for the pice
reviews.text:
We stayed for one night only as I was there on business and had a quick before when we stayed at the Lan Lan 1 hotel which had great location. 

Anyways the Renaissance is quite nice and well done but then you expect that for the money that you pay. The lady at reception tried to sell us an upgrade for usd 55 since our room didn't come with breakfast. I declined that but felt a bit pressured to go for the deal which I didn't feel comfortable with.  We had a riverview room which in the night was quiet nice. The bed was huge too which was great. However the water power in the bathroom was poor, I had trouble washing my hair. No wireless either, only wired internet. We had breakfast in room which was good. There are a few restaurants and shops around but not very close to Ben than market.
reviews.positives: Big beds
reviews.negatives: Poor water flow, location

reviews.title: Good location and Great Buffets!
reviews.text: The hotel is located by the river side in District 1.  It is easily accessible to good dining and entertainment sites.  The room was clean and comfortable.  The hotel staff were courteous and helpful.  But best of all are the breakfast and dinner buffets.  The selection is good and food delicious.  The dinner buffet features a free-flow of beers and wines option.  It is good value for money for the business traveler.  Will be back for more!
reviews.positives: Location, food and beverage, comfort
reviews.response:
Dear Choon,

It is our pleasure to be at your services and we look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Wishing you well and kind regards,

reviews.title: Very good location on the riverside.
reviews.text:
Although a riverside room was booked over a month in advance, on arrival we were given a side street room because the correct room had been "overlooked". Since it was the first New Year fireworks in some 4 years, I guess the hotel gave away the rooms to someone else. As compensation for the paid room, we were given a rooftop voucher on 31 of December and moved to a riverside room the following night. Here the window did not close properly and it was noisy from the street. Moved again and given a better room.
All in all the service is average.
reviews.positives: Good international standard. Rounded pool, not good for swimming.
reviews.negatives: Windows are not very good at insulating noise from street.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Hotel building is well maintained but room is a little run down.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest. Many thanks for your loyalty to Marriott Hotels and for taking time to share your experience of your recent stay at our Renaissance Saigon. We are delighted to read that you had a pleasant stay during your first time with us at the Renaissance Saigon and that the facilities and foods & drinks offerings were an enjoyable part of your experience. On the management front, we have taken note your feedbacks and share with related team for immediate improvement. Please kindly allow me to inform you that we are planning a rooms renovation project with extensive refurbishment work, hopefully starting in the next coming months. It will be a pleasure for us all to welcome you back into our home when you return to Saigon in the future, and we wish you safe travels until we see you then! With regards, Alexander Schoell, General Manager, Renaissance Riverside Hotel Saigon

Die Luft an dieser viel befahrenen Straße ist extrem schlecht.
Die Luft im Zimmer ist auch extrem
schlecht, parfümiert und stickig.
Ebenso war es nicht möglich den Aufenthalt um 1 Nacht zu verkürzen.
Ich kann das Hotel wirklich nicht empfehlen.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings about this place
reviews.text:
Pros: Excellent location. Can't beat the location. 
Staff, especially the doorperson in the front, were extremely kind and helpful. Breakfast was good. 

Cons: The carpet in the room seemed damp and smelly. There is no bidet in the toilet. Bathroom supplies such as Q-Tips and cotton balls seem to be low quality. 
We were informed that we can attend the Vietnam Independence Day even on the roof bar, and when we went, we were told that we cannot order any drinks if we didn't make a reservation, and was told to go to first floor, buy drinks, and bring them to the roof. I thought that was ridiculous. We were also not aware of dinner buffet that we could have made reservation that night.

reviews.negatives: Aufgrund eines zusätzlich geschäftlichen Termins in Saigon wollten wir sehr gern den Aufenthalt im Hotel um eine Nacht verlängern, auch alternativ in ein anderes Zimmer im Hotel umziehen, jedoch war dies nicht möglich und für uns leider sehr unangenehm. Die Rezeption hat es uns nicht ermöglichen können, darüber waren wir sehr traurig und wir mussten alternativ eine andere Unterkunft für eine Nacht in Saigon suchen. Schade!

Justificaram esta situação com o facto de o hotel estar cheio, mas nós marcamos, pelo menos, 3 meses antes!!!!
Fomos jantar ao buffet de marisco. Havia muito marisco, o pessoal era muito simpático e prestável, mas o marisco estava mal confecionado, cozinhado de mais e seco.
Fomos à piscina do hotel, que tem uma vista óptima, mas o bar é muito mau, parece um bar de rua, sem qualquer refinamento.

reviews.title: 연회장 소음 최악
reviews.positives: 조식
reviews.negatives: 호텔구조가 최악임. 호털중심에 연회장이 있고 객실이 연회장을 둘러싼 구조인데 연회장이 개방형이라 연회장에서 행사 진행시 빵빵터지는 앰프 소리가 모든 객실로 다 들어옴. 밤9시까지 행사진행하느라 객실에 머물 수가 없음.  행사 끝나고 나서는 밤10시에 무대철거 한다고 밤새 드릴 소음 유발하여 잠을 잘 수가 없음. 이미 외부에 대관해준거라 항의해봐야 소용없음. 사과는 하지만 달라지는건 없었음. 소음대책이랍시고 직원이 복도쪽에서 수건으로 객실 문틈을 막아놓음. 행사진행하는동안 출입하지 말라는 것인가? 망고빙수 먹으러 롯데호텔 갔었는데 확실히 비교됨.  별만 다섯개지 호텔 운영이나 규모나 5성급 호텔이라고 보기 어려움. 8층 객실 복도에서 5층 연회장 행사 사진 찍은거 올리니 확인해보세요. 인생 최악의 호텔임. 비용 처리도 이상함. 더블룸에 엑스트라베드 추가요청하니 예약당시에는 추가비용 없다고 메일 보내놓고 체크인 할 때는 추가요금 받아야겠다고해서 체크아웃할때까지 싸움. 소음 문제 미안하다고 추가요금 안받겠다고 선심쓰는 척 함. 체크인할때부터 기분상해서 휴가 망침. 잘 생각해보시길 권함. 연회장 소음은 구조적으로 개선이 불가능해보임.

reviews.title: Thất vọng
reviews.negatives:
Nhân viên lễ tân tại thời điểm người của công ty mình check in chiều ngày 13/12.
Lần đầu mình cảm thấy quá tệ và xấu hổ, khi sếp tổng bên tập đoàn cty mình lần đầu tiên từ Trung sang Việt Nam công tác ngắn ngày mà có ấn tượng xấu từ 1 trong những chuỗi khách sạn nổi tiếng 5sao của Marriott. Mình đặt phòng cho sếp là phòng king bed, nhân viên lễ Tân lại làm thủ tục check in phòng 2 giường đơn, xong sếp mình phát hiện ra ko đúng thì gọi hỏi mình sao lại đặt phòng 2 giường đơn cho sếp. Mình nghe xong thì kiểm tra lại booking thì ko hề book sai loại phòng . Khi gọi cho lễ Tân thì bắt mình chờ xử lý . Sau 1 hồi sếp mình giằng co vấn đề mãi mới được nhận đúng phòng nghỉ ngơi. Sau khi kết thúc kỳ công tác, sếp mình mới nói lại với mình “ lễ Tân ban đầu xử lý vấn đề bằng cách bắt sếp mình trả thêm 8$ để nâng hạng phòng king bed” Ôi trời nghe xong thì vô lý hết sức. Vấn đề lỗi tại lễ Tân check in phòng sai rồi mà ko nhận, còn bắt trả thêm tiền. Chuỗi KS 5 sao chuẩn quốc tế mà sao có lễ Tân thái độ làm việc quá tệ, phải chăng đây là thủ đoạn vòi tiền khách hàng nước ngoài chăng ……  thiệt là cảm thấy mất mặt thật.

reviews.title: Staffs are worse
reviews.text:
We stayed 2 nights (17-19 October 2025). Location is good, hotel is good, too. But staffs are not enough training to serve in this standard hotel.
At the time we checked out, the staff informed that we booked pick up  from airport to hotel   
We showed them  taxi fee receipt at the time we checked in at the hotel. They still haven't accepted. We asked them, pls check again quickly we need to go to airport but after the staff talk again with someone on the phone, she still couldn't clear the matter even though she few times checked with us number of people & number of room  we booked. Finally, another man staffs came & requested us go down to the lobby to check with another staff there. To solved the matter quickly, my family went to lobby, the man staff there also said that we used pick up service from airport. We asked him to showed us the booking, and he showed us the email, we saw the email in the hotel, we showed him, the mame in tillte of email doesn't mine.  He said, it doesn't matter. We again told him, number of people needed to pick up are not same with member of my family.. . He still hasn't accepted ... OMG... we again showed him, end of email the written full name is not mine. He still didn't accept.  We asked to talk with the  manager to solve this problem quickly if not we will be late & taxi is waiting for us outside the hotel.  And then another man staff came (we met him at check out counter) with a listless attitude. He just asked us to leave. 
We couldn't imagine this 2 staffs with this attitude. They didn't said the word "sorry" even 1 times.
We left the hotel with all the good mood for the holiday gone. Terrible

reviews.title: Staying in Ho Chih Minh City
reviews.positives: It was near the city, so walking around town and then coming back to the hotel was convenient.
reviews.negatives: There wasn't any guide on where to go or what to do around town upon checking in. The receptionist should make it a point to ask the guest if they are comfortable moving around the town and recommend some good restaurants around town.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: thanks for your excellent service, especially Lucy who is very patient and helpful.

reviews.title: Quite a good choice
reviews.text:
If you like a hotel with a good (river) view, this is certainly a good choice.  Another big advantage is the location, you can basically walk to the popular spots and shopping areas on foot (if you can stand the heat and humidity).

Most staff at the reception (especially the guys) and concierge are very friendly and helpful.  They are happy to answer all the (stupid and most frequently asked) questions you have on directions and recommendations for where to go to see, eat and shop.
reviews.positives: Very good location and nice river view.  Most staff are friendly and helpful when asked questions; They give clear directions and recommendations on where to go
reviews.negatives: It would be great if there is free wifi in the room for at least one hour a day for members
